name: Dan Baer
subject: Seven Years Later
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
We cannot become ok with rendering the victims of our country's gun violence epidemic as statistics. As numbers.
|
---

| | Seven years ago today, at a movie theater in Aurora, Colorado, a deranged gunman wounded and killed scores of victims. Today, we remember those who lost their lives. Jonathan Blunk
A.J. Boik
Jesse Childress
Gordon Cowden
Jessica Ghawi
John Thomas Larimer
Matt McQuinn
Micayla Medek
Alex Sullivan
Veronica Moser-Sullivan
Alex Teves
Rebecca Wingo |
---

We cannot become ok with rendering the victims of our country's gun violence epidemic as statistics. As numbers.

We know better. You and I know better. These were wives and husbands. Daughters and sons. Best friends. Americans.

There is no reason why we have to keep doing this. There is no reason we have to keep living like this. There is no reason we have to keep living through this.

Too many of our elected officials are doing nothing, even though they have the power to stem this senseless tide of violence.

I grew up a short bike ride down the road from Columbine. This is personal to me. Addressing gun violence is one of the reasons I'm in this fight - so that people, in Colorado or elsewhere, don't have to live in fear of the next Columbine or Pulse nightclub, or Marjorie Stoneman Douglas, or Las Vegas, or Aurora or...

I know you haven't abandoned hope, and neither have I. I believe in the America that refuses to accept this as our fate. The America that marched, protested, and voted to curb the gun violence epidemic; to take seriously mental health issues; to curb the influence of the NRA.

And even in the face of unspeakable evil, we have risen with one voice to say "no more." That's why I'm in this fight.

Brian and I will be holding each other and our loved ones just a little bit tighter today, as we remember those who don't have that opportunity. I hope you'll do the same.

With love for the families for whom this is an especially painful anniversary,
Dan

---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82659/232dfd1/9af7db2/62a11135/3392116796/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82659/232dfd1/9af7db2/62a1113a/3392116796/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but it's because we're running a grassroots campaign and rejecting corporate PAC money. Hi, Did you see this? We just reviewed our records and noticed your name was missing. A majority of Minnesotans support common-sense gun safety measures, including most gun owners, but Minnesota GOP lawmakers refuse to act. We can't let them get away with it. **We 're still about 3,750 signatures short and our deadline is at MIDNIGHT.** [**Help us keep the pressure on. Add your name right now to demand action on gun violence.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/60gEv3adz7OWb2AmB1X2xWJvd99lijNIvjzjdvoYIJA=/oTkZp3niTDlHdGuwgyMVmqhw2ffOr2t1wLICI1Vm1Zw=) **[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/60gEv3adz7OWb2AmB1X2xWJvd99lijNIvjzjdvoYIJA=/oTkZp3niTDlHdGuwgyMVmqhw2ffOr2t1wLICI1Vm1Zw=)** Thank you, Team Walz-Flanagan \-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Tim Walz
> **ADD YOUR NAME: Demand Action on Gun Violence**
> [**Help us collect 10,000 signatures in support of common-sense gun safety measures by next week to keep the pressure on lawmakers this summer.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/60gEv3adz7OWb2AmB1X2xWJvd99lijNIvjzjdvoYIJA=/oTkZp3niTDlHdGuwgyMVmqhw2ffOr2t1wLICI1Vm1Zw=) **[Add Your Name](https://act.myngp.com/el/60gEv3adz7OWb2AmB1X2xWJvd99lijNIvjzjdvoYIJA=/oTkZp3niTDlHdGuwgyMVmqhw2ffOr2t1wLICI1Vm1Zw=)** My friend, Everyone deserves to live their lives without the fear of being shot and killed. It's sad such an obvious statement is worth repeating, but the fact is hundreds of Minnesotans are killed by gun violence every year. On a national scale, 100 Americans _per day_ are killed with guns. I say this as a lifelong sportsman. I say this as a 24-year veteran of the Army National Guard. I say this as a former high school teacher. I say this as a father. Enough is enough. I reject the false narrative pushed by the NRA that we can't protect our children, our loved ones, and ourselves without infringing on second amendment rights. We absolutely can, and a majority of Minnesotans agree, including most gun owners. That's why I fought alongside DFL lawmakers to push for common-sense "red flag" and background check gun safety laws last session. Unfortunately, both measures were blocked by Republicans who couldn't muster the courage to do the right thing. **We can 't afford another year of inaction and obstruction as the gun violence epidemic rages on, claiming lives and devastating families across our state and country.** With legislators back in their home districts for the summer, I'm asking you to help me make an undeniable statement about the overwhelming support in our state for common-sense gun safety measures. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down.
Hey, friend - Gary scheduled a meeting for tomorrow morning to go over the results from the survey he sent recently. It only takes a couple of minutes, and your feedback is so important to our success. Will you take the survey? I know Gary is really looking forward to hearing your thoughts. You can use this link: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://surveys.signforgood.com/GP-priorities-survey?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk7-su-nd")**
-Dan
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary Peters
Date: Tue, Jul 16, 2019
Subject: looking for your input
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dacb3/5721a3ed/731b8df8/ef9b257/1837432901/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

Back in 2010, when I voted for the Affordable Care Act as a first-term congressman, Republicans threatened to end my political career. A decade later, they're still trying to take me down. It's a real ugly part of politics, but do you know why I keep fighting? Because more than 20 million Americans nationwide gained health insurance from the ACA, including 1.2 million Michiganders. It has literally saved lives.

Unfortunately, my opponent has called the Affordable Care Act a "monstrosity" and vowed to end it. He wants to take us back to the days when insurance companies called the shots and could make care unaffordable for those with preexisting conditions. name: Cory Booker
subject: It's on us to condemn white supremacy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I was absolutely sickened when I heard the chants of "send her back" at a Trump rally this week -- directed at a congresswoman who better represents America's ideals than this president ever will. My parents watched George Wallace on TV in black and white. At Trump's rally that night, millions of Americans saw him in living color. This week, I took to my guest column in _Essence_ to talk about how we can counter the racism from this White House and be a better ally to women of color. I hope you'll read it below and then share it with your friends and family. Cory _**Essence: Trump 's Racist Attacks And How We Fail Women Of Color**_ _Representatives Ayanna Pressley (D-MA), Rashida Tlaib (D-MI), Ilhan Omar (D-MN) and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-NY) don 't need me, or anyone really, to stand up for them against Donald Trump._ _They are intelligent, accomplished, and all four won their elections fairly. And during their press conference Monday, they showed they are more than capable of not just standing up against the president 's bigoted fearmongering and harmful policies, but for a country that lives up to its most fundamental values._ _The congresswomen certainly do not need saviors -- but we need to be allies. We have a collective responsibility to speak out and speak up against this attack and everything it represents._ _The words Donald Trump chose -- telling four American congresswomen, three of whom were born in the United States -- to "go back" were purposefully racist. He invoked a centuries-old weapon -- a message not just to the four congresswomen but to all people of color: Your identity does not belong to you, your history does not belong to you, your body does not belong to you._ _And his message wasn 't just for us -- it was a dangerous declaration from the highest office in the land about whom he believes is worthy of protection. His message was as clear as it is dangerous and it is the kind of rhetoric that gives license to the violent white supremacy he refuses to condemn. Despite the president's failure to acknowledge it, white supremacist terror is a serious threat; the majority of terrorist attacks since 9/11 have been from right-wing extremist groups, and the majority of those have been white supremacist groups._ _The president 's words and his decision to target four congresswomen of color was alone a dangerous and disgusting display of racism and bigotry. But it also reveals a pernicious truth: Donald Trump chose to target four women of color because he believes he can._ _He chose to target them for the same reason his administration 's immigration policy is steeped in xenophobia and is putting Brown women and children in cages at our southern border._ _And he chose to target them for the same reason that we live in a country where women of color are disproportionately targeted by our broken criminal justice system, where Black women 's pain is minimized in a broken health care system, and where Black and Latina women are paid cents on the dollar compared to other groups._ _This most recent display of the president 's bigotry does not exist in a vacuum -- it exists in an environment that is the result of centuries of systemic oppression._ _The next president of the United States has an obligation not just to condemn this vile and racist language but to commit to repairing centuries of harm with a bold, forward-looking vision -- for taking on the maternal mortality epidemic that is disproportionately killing women of color, for closing the persistent racial wealth gap, for ending the separation of families of color in America, in our broken immigration system and in our broken system of mass incarceration._ _Let us use this moment not just to condemn Donald Trump -- we know what we've got in him -- but to commit ourselves to build a truly just nation._ _Women of color and especially Black women have been at the heart of every fight for justice throughout our country 's history, fighting not just for themselves, but for all of us. Too often, we have failed them._ _Like Angela Davis once said, "It is not enough to be non-racist, we must be anti-racist." And in this moral moment, that means it is not enough to be outraged without action -- it's time to stand up and stand with women of color, now and in the fights ahead._ [**_See the original post by clicking here._**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0840/5fca0d19/a672874/29181cd9/3389646868/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.essence.com/feature/cory-booker-responds-trumps-racism/") [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0840/5fca0d19/a672874/29181cd8/3389646868/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.essence.com%2Ffeature%2Fcory-booker-responds-trumps-racism%2F") [](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0840/5fca0d19/a672874/29181b27/3389646868/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Cory+Booker+On+Trump%E2%80%99s+Racist+Attacks+And+How+We+Fail+Women+Of+Color%C2%A0https://www.essence.com/feature/cory-booker-responds-trumps-racism/%3Futm_source%3Dtwitter.com%26utm_medium%3Dsocial%26utm_campaign%3Dsocial-button-sharing+via+%40ESSENCE")

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: $1,630,150 in PAC contributions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
When House Democrats passed the Raise the Wage Act this week, they passed it to a Senate chamber with 53 Republicans whose corporate donors will fight tooth and nail to keep wages down for 40 million workers — despite most Americans agreeing that people need $15 per hour to get by.

The hard truth is that this bill isn’t going to pass until we flip the Senate. That’s why I need your help.

I’m not accepting a penny of corporate PAC money, which means sending emails like this to supporters like you is one of the primary ways we can raise money. Will you chip in $15 today to support a $15 minimum wage, getting corporate PAC money out of our politics, and helping us flip the U.S. Senate in 2020? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-corporate-pacs?refcode=em072119a]

This Wednesday will mark the ten year anniversary of the minimum wage rising to $7.25 per hour. We’ve heard the stories of workers who have two or three jobs and still can’t get by.

David Perdue has raised over $1.6 million from PACs since he was first elected. That means more accountability to PACs than the people he’s been elected to represent. And that has framed his entire set of priorities since he got to Washington, including opposing this bill.

My mom worked for 40 years in the meat department of grocery stores like A&P and Kroger. She was a proud union member, and we were able to get by, but earning a wage of $7.25 per hour, or even $2.13 for the so-called “tipped minimum”, is not enough for people today – not even close.
We cannot afford to waste six more years with David Perdue’s distractions: blocking legislation to raise the minimum wage, failing to enact comprehensive immigration reform, or falling behind on the many other issues actively being made worse by Republican policies.

You shouldn’t be able to take money from corporate PACs and then vote to protect their interests over those of working class people. That’s why I’m rejecting corporate PAC money and asking you to be the force powering our campaign. Chip in $15 to help me defeat David Perdue today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-corporate-pacs?refcode=em072119a]

Thank you for supporting elections with integrity.
Yours truly,
Teresa

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I hope you can read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
We knew this would be hard, we just didn’t know in what ways it would be hard. We knew we’d be tested, and we are all being tested.
#
We knew this would be hard, we just didn’t know in what ways it would be hard. We knew we’d be tested, and we are all being tested.
We are going to have to overcome hardship if we are going to demonstrate to the country that we have the strength and commitment to overcome Trump; or to show that we understand what it’s like to be counted down and then to then rise above the experts’ expectations. To show them and our fellow Americans that we are prepared to take on the toughest job in the world at the toughest time in our history. The greatest set of challenges we’ve ever faced.
We’re doing the right thing, we’re doing it at the right time, and I’m convinced that we’re doing it in the right way. First and foremost, our campaign has been funded by all people, no PACs. No corporations, lobbyists, or special interests either.
[If that’s the kind of campaign you want to be part of, can I count on you now to make a $3 donation to keep us strong?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18286?refcode=ema20190721-43832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=43832%2E444211%2EZwOVOt)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18286?refcode=ema20190721-43832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=43832%2E444211%2EZwOVOt)**
What I see and feel on the ground is amazing. Last weekend in Nashua, Andover, Manchester, Peterborough, Amherst. It’s real. I see it in Iowa, in Williams — population 330 — where a third of that number came out to see us. What I’m learning, how we’re connecting and how we’re building our team and our commitments. I absolutely saw it in Nashville and in Minneapolis. I feel it in South Carolina. I feel it in Nevada. And Texas is still the source of the opportunity, the energy, and the model for how we do this.
I see it in our team. In the dedication, the work that they’re doing, the level of sacrifice they’ve offered to this country. Their faces — the smiles, the energy, the determination. It’s all amazing.
Despite all of this, there is definitely a disconnect between what the political pundits see versus what we see on the ground. There are many reasons for that. I’ve received a million pieces of advice on how to make it better. Ultimately it comes down to me. Me doing the best possible job when I have the chance to talk to a national audience. Me doing as well as possible in the debates. And it also means me being me. We’ve got to show all the ways this campaign is different from any other, and why that matters when it comes to why we can win.
We’ve got to run with nothing to lose instead of protecting whatever we gain by playing it safe. Really, that’s when we find joy, where it feels joyful to people looking in from outside, and where it looks that way to a national audience.
And there’s got to be a patience and a persistence — we don’t know when voters will make up their minds. But we’ve got to be there when they do and put in the work beforehand to make our case.
At times like this, I think it’s helpful to think back to why we’re doing this in the first place. For me, it’s my kids — the very real knowledge that they’re counting on me and on all of us. The horror show that is this administration, the open cruelty and racism, the tearing down of so much of what made us good to begin with. The unmet challenges of climate change and gun violence.
I want my kids to be excited about the future, not afraid of it. I want the world to be better for them. So I’m trying to be better and do better for them. I can’t let them down.
Do this if you get the chance — especially when it’s tough, when you’re down, when you have your moment of doubt — think back to this moment from the future. What will it feel like to have won? To have proven the doubters wrong? To have overcome these challenges, to have defeated evil in November of 2020, and to be part of an administration that lives up to what America really can mean? Look back from that and this moment will make sense.
We all have to find the deepest, most personal reason that we are part of this campaign and stay loyal to that. Things will be better than they are at this moment, things at times will be tougher. Our strength will come from our devotion to the urgency we feel, to one another, and to this country.
[If you’re as excited as I am to keep building this campaign, make a $3 donation right now.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18286?refcode=ema20190721-43832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=43832%2E444211%2EZwOVOt)
Half of all our campaign resources come from people like you clicking emails like this one. So these donations — no matter what size — really make a difference.
Thank you for all you’re doing. I count myself extraordinarily lucky to have the chance to do this work with each and every one of you.
\- Beto
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/18286?refcode=ema20190721-43832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=43832%2E444211%2EZwOVOt)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=43832%2E444211%2EZwOVOt). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

body:
We wanted to check in because our records show you haven’t filled out our
official Kamala 2020 July debate survey.

We’ll only keep this survey open for a limited amount of time before we
pass along your feedback to Kamala and the rest of the team, so don’t miss
your chance to make your voice heard.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1001&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Take our official Kamala 2020 July debate survey right now to help
Kamala with her debate preparation. It’s easy and quick:

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1002&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Take the survey

Thanks for sharing your thoughts.

— Team Kamala

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original email from Kamala Harris, July 20, 2019

Now that our team knows which night I’ll take the stage for the July
debate, it’s time to get to work. Each debate is a new opportunity for our
people-powered campaign to reach millions more undecided voters across the
country -- and to contrast our message and platform with those of our
opponents.

In the coming days, my team and I are set to dig in deep on debate
preparation so we’re ready for anything that comes our way. But before we
start, I need your help:

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1003&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Will you take a moment to share the top 3 issues you want to hear about
during the upcoming July debate? Fill out this quick survey and add your
thoughts »

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1004&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Take the survey

You are the voice of our movement. That’s why I reach out every so often
to ask for your input and thoughts.

As the news cycle and political climate rapidly change with each passing
day, I rely on hearing directly from you and supporters like you across
the country to speak truth about the issues that matter most.

The upcoming July debate is an opportunity to amplify real solutions for
every American -- no matter who you are or where you live. Your input
matters a great deal.

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1005&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Click here to fill out our brief July debate survey and let me know
what’s on your mind.

Thanks for all you do.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

[ https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-1907-july-debate-survey?refcode=ema190721-full&source=ema190721-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&akid=5629%2E5755789%2EswxhOo ]Take the survey

name: Bill de Blasio
subject: Meet me at the Democratic debate?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020
body:
You could win an all-expenses-paid trip to meet me at the second Democratic presidential primary debate on July 31.
# [](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0d/2464119862/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=685_org_em_fr")
Friend --
It's official -- we've made it to the second debate!
Since we never would have gotten this opportunity without your hard work and dedication, I want to make sure someone like you joins me in Detroit. Maybe even you, friend.
**[Donate $1 now to be automatically entered to win an all-expenses-paid trip for yourself and a companion to join me at the second Democratic primary debate in Detroit on July 31.](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0d/2464119862/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=685_org_em_fr")**
Or _[click here](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0c/2464119862/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/s/enter-to-win-detroit-debate?source=685_org_em_fr")_ to be entered without making a contribution.
Plenty of candidates in this race have offered big promises, but I'm the only candidate with a record of delivering on them: from free universal Pre-K and a Green New Deal to $15 minimum wage and guaranteed health care. It will mean the world to have you join me as I take those wins to a national stage.
But enter soon: **this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity ends in four days**.
[](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0d/2464119862/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=685_org_em_fr")
We're in a battle for the heart and soul of our party and our country, and nominating a candidate who represents the status quo will hand re-election to Donald Trump.
I'm incredibly proud of the changes we've been able to make in New York City so far, and I'm just as proud of who we've done it with. Just about everything we've fought for has upset the status quo by helping working people. As we bring that record of accomplishment onto the national stage for the second time, it's important to me to make sure we bring a person who's fought with us to the national stage -- literally.
This is a once-in-a-lifetime chance to attend the historic first debate of the 2020 Democratic primary (for free!). But with the debate coming up fast, we can't accept any entries after 11:59 p.m. on Thursday, July 25.
**[Will you join me in Detroit? Donate $1 before 11:59 p.m. on July 25 to automatically enter your name-> ](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0d/2464119862/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=685_org_em_fr")**
I can't wait to share our record of helping the working people of New York in front of the whole country again. This is a big opportunity.
Fingers crossed!
Bill

[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b0d/2464119862/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NSJ9/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/deblasio_detroitcontest?refcode=685_org_em_fr")
---

PAID FOR BY DE BLASIO 2020

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you'd like to unsubscribe, you can click [_here_](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b36/2464119862/VEsHBg/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://act.billdeblasio.com/unsubscribe"), but we'd hate to see you go. Learn more about [Bill's campaign](https://act.billdeblasio.com/page/m/6bf21243/1630b3eb/51274c23/5f555b35/2464119862/VEsHAQ/?g=VmvkeFNw52hdLWhQmfUOXQ "https://billdeblasio.com/") here.

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcconnell-email?refcode=rtw_20190721_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, a little over a year ago, Donald Trump nominated Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court.

Since then, Mitch McConnell has only become more ruthless -- forcing vote after vote in the Senate to pack the courts with Trump-appointed, lifetime federal judges.

Many of these judges confirmed by McConnell's Senate are members of the right-wing Federalist Society, a shadowy organization funded by undisclosed donors and devoted to stocking the judiciary with conservative activists who will help overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , legalize discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans, limit the power of workers and consumers, and undermine the right to vote.

Tina is fighting as hard as she can to stop him, but she wants to hear from you before midnight. **Do you approve of the way Mitch McConnell is using his Republican majority to run the Senate?** **[YES](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcconnell-email?refcode=rtw_20190721_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** **[NO](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcconnell-email?refcode=rtw_20190721_em&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")** We're looking for 5,000 responses from our best supporters before midnight to share with Tina. Please let us know what you think.

Team Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-mcconnell-email?refcode=rtw_20190721_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

body:
#
Team,
This campaign is about you, not me. If we truly want a representative in the United States Senate to fix things for us non-millionaires we need to elect someone that understands the struggles of everyday life.
I don't have billionaire friends or special interests to fund my campaign, but I know that with the people of Montana on my side, we can take on the millionaires and billionaires and win this Senate seat back for all of us.
[**I 'm not a millionaire, team. I'm an everyday American like you. Will you stand with me and contribute $5 now?**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190721&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
When you give that $5 donation I truly care about it because I know that it is a sacrifice for you. Thank you.
The millionaires and billionaires aren't setting our agenda--you are. This campaign is about bringing a voice for Montanans to D.C. and fighting to solve the issues that impact all of us: health care, tariffs, climate change, wage and wealth inequality, and public education.
[**Contribute $5 right now to help fund my people-powered campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190721&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Wilmot

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: How we respond now matters.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
This last week has been a grueling one for people of color and immigrants in our country. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a46823/2003513200/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

This last week has been a grueling one for people of color and immigrants in our country.

ICE raids are potentially looming across a dozen major cities, including Denver (which does not cooperate with ICE requests). Donald Trump has once again degraded the presidency by hurling racist and xenophobic tweets at women of color in Congress, then defending his supporters' chants of hate at one of his rallies.

As I watched the video of those chants, I couldn't help but think of one of our own newly-elected members of Congress: Joe Neguse, who represents Colorado's 2nd District and is himself a son of Eritrean immigrants who arrived in this country as refugees of war.

Trump's behavior, and the behavior he has unleashed, goes beyond those he specifically named in his attacks. It harms us all.

**We are in a severe crisis of division, fueled by this president and intensifying by the day. It has to end, and the way to end it is by making a discipline of listening and learning --to commit ourselves fully to absorbing and empathizing with the experiences and needs of communities of color.**

This weekend it was my privilege to sit down with the Congressional Black Caucus to discuss voting rights and the epidemic of voter suppression in our country, as well as to spend time with the tireless fighters at the NAACP, talking about how to move our country forward.

I even saw Joe himself, and we got a chance to catch up, trade stories about his first months in Congress vs. my months on the campaign trail, and recommit to the fight to see our country through this crisis of division. [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190721_JH_20190721-fr-JH-respond-all_all_i1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I'll sign off with these words: **It 's more important than ever that we reach out across differences of background and culture and origin, and stand together as one.**

Check in on your neighbors; call your friends and colleagues for dinner. Check if there's a way to help refugees in your community.

Donald Trump may not choose different words any time soon. But each and every day, we can choose to stand tall, together, against hate and division.

[**_If you believe in this message and would like to help us keep getting it out across the country, every contribution helps, as well._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190721_JH_20190721-fr-JH-respond-all_all_l1&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Warmly,
John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190721_JH_20190721-fr-JH-respond-all_all_contribbutton&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a4685c/2003513200/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a4685d/2003513200/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a4685a/2003513200/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a4685b/2003513200/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a46858/2003513200/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771750/691c9bd/6d23c0ae/11a4685f/2003513200/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").
